ddt:Target.Name: Cluster_C1A_RUN2_V2.10
ddt:Target.Description:
07-06-2021 Author: Soumya Ranjan V2.10 Auto-Id update for 4.2" ICE & 4.2" EV
05-05-2021 Author: Soumya Ranjan V2.9 DID $0119 bit 10,bit11, DID $0102 bit7 update, New DID$0143and DID $0373 add [Diag-Resource_Config_Status_Routine]CMFB_Config_Status_Routine_V2.31Released (1)
03-02-2021 Author: Soumya Ranjan V2.8 For DID $2803 , in the formula,value of B is updated to -400.
04/12/2020 Author: Soumya Ranjan V2.7 Add Auto-id for 7" cluster & EgocarType_CF values(11-26) updates Add Auto-id for 4.2" cluster
19/11/2020 Author: Soumya Ranjan Nayak V2.6 Screen for these DIDs are updated $0358 ,$0359 ,$0362 ,DID $0638 removed from configuration 1 and added to Config TCI- Odometer [Diag-Resource_Config_Status_Routine]CMFB_Config_Status_Routine_V2.28Release
09/11/2020 Author: D. YOO V2.5 Add Auto-id for 10" cluster
05/10/2020 Author: Troncea V2.4 Add Auto-identification for 4.2"cluster ICE: SW5.20 and EV: SW2.20 _______ 15/07/2020 Author: S. JEON V2.2 Add new DTC - $C104 : Lost Communication with VNodeLC - $C105 : Lost Communication with VNodeELKA - $E19B : Lost Communication with NodeSRVM
18/06/2020 Author: D.YOO V2.1 Flat basis update Modification letter type of parameter (capital vs small) - Sync with written parameter on GCC (ClusterUserSetMenu_P1_CF.LDWsensLevel/LKAsensibility/LDWvibrationLevel)
11/06/2020 Author: S. JEON V2.0 Add Auto-identification for 7"cluster ICE SW60, HEV SW60 Add new requests to 'Screen' - TripFuelLPG, TripFuelCNG, TripDistLPGCNG - LDWMMI_CF - ATBeepInR_CF Correct data resolution - FuelEstimatedConsumption_CF, LPGEstimatedConsumption_CF, CNGEstimatedConsumption_CF - TripDistLPGCNG
02/06/2020 Author: J. ROUSSET V1.9 Flat basis update Add 2 values for "OutputControl_Buttons.Value" Replace $13 by $15 for DTC940E
21/04/2020 Author: S. JEON V1.7 Add Auto-identification for 7"cluster ICE SW50, HEV SW50 _________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 15/04/2020 Author: H. MEJRI V1.6 Flat basis: Auto Ident for SW5 Calsonic Kansei + applicable projects updated _________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 23/03/2020 Author: J. ROUSSET V1.5 Flat basis: Bad version of 1.4 sent to DDT + added Buttons _________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________
23/03/2020 Author: J. ROUSSET V1.4 Flat basis _________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________
24/02/2020 Author: J. ROUSSET V1.3 Minor correction _________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________
07/02/2020 Author: J. ROUSSET V1.2 Update with [Diag-Resource_Config_Status_Routine]CMFB_Config_Status_Routine_V2.28Release _________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________
02/10/2019 Author H.MEJRI V1.1 Delete ClusterUserSetMenu_P2_CF.Clusterinternalusage (only for engineering team) _________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________
01/10/2019 Author: J. ROUSSET V1.0 Creation [Diag-Resource_Config_Status_Routine]CMFB_Config_Status_Routine_V2.23.docx

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjt failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
High Side PWM outputs for backlight monitoring
High Side PWM outputs for backlight monitoring

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: OutputControlStatus
Data.Comment: Testing output : Status

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Comment: VINDataIdentifier

Data.Name: Language_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the language used for messages displayed.

Data.Name: GearBoxType_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the GearBox type (manual or automatic) of the vehicle.

Data.Name: CarburationType_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the carburation type of the vehicle.

Data.Name: DistanceUnit_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the distance unit type (km or miles)

Data.Name: VolumeUnit_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the volume unit of the vehicle.

Data.Name: TripComputerType_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the trip computer type displayed.

Data.Name: TyrePressureUnit_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the tyre pressure unit displayed.

Data.Name: ParkingBrakeType_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the parking brake type (manual or assisted).

Data.Name: OverspeedWarningPresent_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of overspeed warning (10204_1).

Data.Name: ClusterCurrentDistanceByDIAG
Data.Comment: This parameter allows R/W of the total current_distance (see EN_ODO_012), with a resolution of 1km.
Data.Description: This parameter allows R/W of the total current_distance (see EN_ODO_012), with a resolution of 1km. A write request is irreversible

Data.Name: L2displayed1_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 1 will flash is fuel level calculated is ? L2_1.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 0/8 position (lower limit in the red zone Reserve fuel side) if fuel level calculated = L2_1.

Data.Name: L2displayed2_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 2 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_2.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 1/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_2.

Data.Name: L2displayed3_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 3 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_3.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 2/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_3.

Data.Name: L2displayed4_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 4 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_4.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 3/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_4.

Data.Name: L2displayed5_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 5 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_5.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 4/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_5.

Data.Name: L2displayed6_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 6 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_6.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 5/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_6.

Data.Name: L2displayed7_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 7 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_7.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 6/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_7.

Data.Name: L2displayed8_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 8 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_8.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 7/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_8.

Data.Name: L2displayed9_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 9 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_9.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 8/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_9.

Data.Name: VolumeFuelWarning_CF
Data.Comment: used to define the threshold below low fuel level warning occurs.

Data.Name: TripDistanceKm
Data.Comment: This parameter is used for trip computer calculations.

Data.Name: TripFuelUsed
Data.Comment: This parameter is used for trip computer calculations.

Data.Name: TripTimer
Data.Comment: This parameter is used for trip computer calculations.

Data.Name: L0Value
Data.Comment: This parameter is the measure of fuel gauge sensor converted in litre using Vx_FUNC_Rx table.

Data.Name: NumberResetsCausedByFailures
Data.Comment: The "NUMBER_RESETS_CAUSED_BY_FAILURES" parameter is used to count the number of resets caused by fai
Data.Description: The number_resets_caused_by_failures parameter is used to count the number of resets caused by failures (e.g. watchdog)

Data.Name: HandBrakeState
Data.Comment: Physical Input

Data.Name: BrakeFluidLevelState
Data.Comment: Physical Input

Item.Text: Circuit short to battery or open circuit

Data.Name: WindscreenFluidLevel
Data.Comment: Physical Input

Data.Name: FuelGaugeValue
Data.Comment: Physical Input
Data.Description: --> If OC then FuelGaugeValue = V0FuncR0.Resistance_CF --> If SC then FuelGaugeValue = V10FuncR10.Resistance_CF --> If voltage is out of range then FuelGaugeValue = $FFFF

Data.Name: BatteryVoltage
Data.Comment: Physical Input

Data.Name: DistanceUpdateByDiagCounter
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the Cluster_current_distance update number with DIAG request.

Data.Name: DistanceUpdateByExternalECUCounter
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the Cluster_current_distance readjustment number with external ECU
Data.Description: This parameter allows identifying the Cluster_current_distance readjustment number with external ECU (ABS or ECM) request (number of readjustment due to an cluster incoherence, see EN_ODO_040).

Data.Name: UPAMMI_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of UPAMMI

Data.Name: TPMSMMI_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of TPMSMMI

Data.Name: ESCMMI_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter is used for ESC message filtering(only 20403_4)

Data.Name: ExternalTemperature_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the external temperature management.
Data.Description: Note 1: When the EXTERNAL_TEMPERATURE_PRESENT parameter is at 01b, it means that External Temperature sensor acquisition is not managed directly by the cluster

Data.Name: TemperatureUnit_CF
Data.Comment: Defines the default temperature unit that must be displayed by the Cluster ECU

Data.Name: NivocodSensorType_CF
Data.Comment: whether or not brake fluid level sensor has // resistor to distinguish normaly open circ vs no senso

Data.Name: MSCOilChgInitialDistanceInKM_CF
Data.Comment: Shall be written together with MSCOilChangeUsualDistanceInKM !

Data.Name: MSCOilChgInitialPeriodInDay_CF
Data.Comment: Shall be written together with MSCOilChangeUsualPeriodInDay !

Data.Name: MSCOilChgUsualDistanceInKM
Data.Comment: Is the current value displayed for the Oil Schedule Change in km.

Data.Name: MSCOilChgUsualPeriodInDay
Data.Comment: Is the current value displayed for the Oil Schedule Change in day.

Data.Name: FrontSBRInhibition_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows the activation or not of sound only for Front SBR warning (10104,10105)

Data.Name: CauseOfLastTripComputerReset
Data.Comment: CauseOfLastTripComputerRese

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Comment: vehicleManufacturerECUSoftwareNumberDataIdentifier

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber
Data.Comment: vehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumberDataIdentifier

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumber
Data.Comment: systemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumberDataIdentifier

Data.Name: systemSupplierIdentifier
Data.Comment: systemSupplierIdentifierDataIdentifier

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Comment: systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumberDataIdentifier
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: ECUSerialNumber
Data.Comment: ECUSerialNumberDataIdentifier
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the ECU (server) serial number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific.

Data.Name: WelcomeSequenceInhibition_CF
Data.Comment: This configuration is used to activate or deactivate the welcome sequence

Data.Name: TypeApprovalNumber
Data.Comment: exhaustRegulationOrTypeApprovalNumberDataIdentifier

Data.Name: diagnosticVersion
Data.Comment: identificationOptionVehicleManufacturerSpecific

Data.Name: RoutineStatusRecord.RoutineInfo
Data.Comment: Routine information

Data.Name: ProgrammingOperationFingerprint
Data.Comment: vehicleManufacturerSpecific

Data.Name: OperationalReference
Data.Comment: OperationalReference

Data.Name: FuelReadjustmentCause
Data.Mnemonic: Used to give the reason of the fuel readjustement

Item.Text: L2 is initialized with Diag request

Data.Name: DisplayableLanguage_P1_CF.Albanese
Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Name: DisplayableLanguage_P1_CF.Arabic
Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Name: DisplayableLanguage_P1_CF.Bulgarian
Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Name: DisplayableLanguage_P1_CF.ChineseMandarin
Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Name: DisplayableLanguage_P2_CF.Korean
Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Name: DisplayableLanguage_P2_CF.Latvian
Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Name: DisplayableLanguage_P2_CF.Norwegian
Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Name: DisplayableLanguage_P2_CF.Persian.Farsi.Iranian
Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Name: DisplayableLanguage_P2_CF.Polish
Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Name: DisplayableLanguage_P2_CF.Portuguese
Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Name: DisplayableLanguage_P2_CF.Portuguese.Brazilian
Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Name: DisplayableLanguage_P2_CF.Romanian
Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Name: DisplayableLanguage_P2_CF.Russian
Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Name: DisplayableLanguage_P2_CF.Serbian
Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Name: DisplayableLanguage_P2_CF.Slovakian
Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Name: DisplayableLanguage_P2_CF.Indonesian.Bahasa
Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Name: DisplayableLanguage_P3_CF.Spanish.Castillan
Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Name: DisplayableLanguage_P3_CF.Spanish.LatinAmerican
Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Name: DisplayableLanguage_P3_CF.Vietnamese
Data.Comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeUSM
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeACU
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeBRAKE_ABS_VDC
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeEPKB
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeAT
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeECM
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeHEVC
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeEPS
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeHFM
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeUPA_SONAR
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeFWS
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeIDM
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeVADA
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeADAS
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeRADAR
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeFRONT_CAMERA
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeMAGIC_FOLDING
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeTCU
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeMULTIMEDIA_CANV
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeMULTIMEDIA_CANM
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeHUD
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeVSP
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeADB
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeDSMU
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeMBL
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeEBA
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part2_CF.VNodeESC
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part2_CF.VNodeTPW
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part2_CF.VNodeTPMS
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part2_CF.VNodeBSW
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part2_CF.VNodeMULTIDRIVE
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part2_CF.VNodeHFP
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part2_CF.VNodeHFP_FAST
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part2_CF.VNodeSBW
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part2_CF.VNodeECALL
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part2_CF.VNodeSCR
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part2_CF.VNodeAEBS
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part2_CF.VNodeAT_RPM
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part2_CF.VNodeMM_SETTING
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: VehicleGUIStyle_CF
Data.Comment: Allows to change the representation of the vehicle in the graphism shown in the TFT

Data.Name: TACStrategy_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows to select which filtering strategy of RPM pointer shall be used.

Data.Name: DayBacklightsPresent_CF.Zone5
Data.Comment: Force backlight of some parts to be ON in day mode. Has no effect on night mode.

Data.Name: DayBacklightsPresent_CF.Zone6
Data.Comment: Force backlight of some parts to be ON in day mode. Has no effect on night mode.

Data.Name: DayBacklightsPresent_CF.Zone7
Data.Comment: Force backlight of some parts to be ON in day mode. Has no effect on night mode.

Data.Name: DayBacklightsPresent_CF.Zone8
Data.Comment: Force backlight of some parts to be ON in day mode. Has no effect on night mode.

Data.Name: DayBacklightsPresent_CF.Zone4
Data.Comment: Force backlight of some parts to be ON in day mode. Has no effect on night mode.

Data.Name: WelcomeSequenceType_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the welcome sequence variants (Bose, Initiale...)

Data.Name: OilLevelPresent_CF
Data.Comment: Allows identifying the presence of oil level management (10102_x) and DTC management

Data.Name: MSCOilChgWarningThresholdKM_CF
Data.Comment: This configuration is used to define the first warning threshold for maintenance schedule in kilomet
Data.Description: This configuration is used to define the first warning threshold for maintenance schedule in kilometer (ValConfigSeuilAlerte1_Km in 65450-2009-45-CDC_CLUSTER_X98).

Item.Text: Present with OCS AND internal counter

Data.Name: MSCServiceWarningThresholdKM_CF
Data.Comment: Used to define the first warning threshold for Service schedule in kilometer.
Data.Description: This configuration is used to define the first warning threshold for maintenance schedule in kilometer (ValConfigSeuilAlerte1_Km in 65450-2009-45-CDC_CLUSTER_X98).

Data.Name: FuelReadjustNearFull.L0_CF
Data.Comment: The "C_RECALAGE_PLEIN" parameter is used to define 3 parameters (SeuilRecal_L0_Plein, SeuilRecal_L2_

Data.Name: FuelRangeCorrectKmAutonom_CF
Data.Comment: Used to define what t is the distance range on which the driving range is computed

Data.Name: L2displayed10_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 9 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_9.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 8/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_9.

Data.Name: L2displayed11_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 9 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_9.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 8/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_9.

Data.Name: L2displayed12_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 9 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_9.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 8/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_9.

Data.Name: TCI_RemainingDistanceIncreaseInhibitionThreshold_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 9 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_9.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 8/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_9.

Data.Name: TCI_RemainingDistanceDisapearanceThreshold_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 9 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_9.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 8/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_9.

Data.Name: TCI_RemainingDistanceWarningThreshold_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 9 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_9.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 8/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_9.

Data.Name: GAU_BigGapForInitReadjustment_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 9 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_9.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 8/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_9.

Data.Name: GAU_KConso_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 9 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_9.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 8/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_9.

Data.Name: GAU_LimitAngleReajustmentInhibition_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 9 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_9.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 8/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_9.

Data.Name: GAU_SlopeDetectionStrategy_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 9 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_9.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 8/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_9.

Data.Name: GAU_GapForInitReadjstmentSlopeStrategy_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 9 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_9.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 8/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_9.

Data.Name: GAU_MinimumRefuelDetectionThreshold_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 9 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_9.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 8/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_9.

Data.Name: DayBacklightsPresent_CF.Zone3
Data.Comment: Force backlight of some parts to be ON in day mode. Has no effect on night mode.

Data.Name: DayBacklightsPresent_CF.Zone2
Data.Comment: Force backlight of some parts to be ON in day mode. Has no effect on night mode.

Data.Name: DayBacklightsPresent_CF.Zone1
Data.Comment: Force backlight of some parts to be ON in day mode. Has no effect on night mode.

Data.Name: MexType_CF
Data.Comment: Used to identifying the management of the current driving mode

Data.Name: SCRMMI_CF
Data.Comment: Used to display SCR functions

Data.Name: GaugingThreshold.High_CF
Data.Comment: Used to define the gauge High_CF

Data.Name: GaugingThreshold.Low_CF
Data.Comment: Used to define the gauge Low_CF

Data.Name: TripFuelLPG
Data.Comment: Used for LPG trip computer calculations

Data.Name: TripFuelCNG
Data.Comment: Used for CNG trip computer calculations

Data.Name: TripDistLPGCNG
Data.Comment: Used for trip computer calculations

Data.Name: MemorizedOilMeasures
Data.Comment: Used for reading oil level

Data.Name: OilFlags.B0
Data.Comment: Used for reading algo flags for oil level

Data.Name: OilFlags.B1
Data.Comment: Used for reading algo flags for oil level

Data.Name: L3DuringFuelReadjust
Data.Comment: The "L3_VALUE_DURING_FUEL_UPDATE" parameter keeps the value present during the last fuel update what
Data.Description: The l3_value_during_fuel_update parameter keeps the value present during the last fuel update whatever the fuel update cause.

Data.Name: L2offDuringFuelReadjust
Data.Comment: The "L2offDuringFuelReadjust" parameter keeps the value present during the last fuel update w
Data.Description: The L2off_VALUE_during_fuel_update parameter keeps the value present during the last fuel update whatever the fuel update cause.

Data.Name: L0onDuringFuelReadjust
Data.Comment: The "L0onDuringFuelReadjust" parameter keeps the value present during the last fuel update wh
Data.Description: The L0on_VALUE_during_fuel_update parameter keeps the value present during the last fuel update whatever the fuel update cause.

Data.Name: ExtECUDistBeforeReadjust
Data.Comment: The cluster stored distance before readjustment (in case of CAN incoherence or Cluster incoherence)
Data.Description: The cluster stored distance before readjustment (in case of CAN incoherence or Cluster incoherence, see EN_ODO_036 and EN_ODO_040). The stored distance is the value of CAN received parameter before readjusting.

Data.Name: IGNWire
Data.Comment: Status of the ignition wire

Data.Name: EgocarType_CF
Data.Comment: Used to display the ego car according to the vehicle type

Data.Name: TypeApprovalNumber2
Data.Comment: exhaustRegulationOrTypeApprovalNumberDataIdentifier

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: DTCCount
Data.Comment: DTC count

Item.Text: Trip Unit has been correctly configured
Trip Unit has not been correctly configured

Data.Name: BootVersion
Data.Comment: BootSoftwareIdentificationDataIdentifier
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: ClusterUserSetPresent_CF
Data.Comment: Allows identifying the presence of User setting menu in the cluster

Data.Name: DPFManualRegenMMI_CF
Data.Comment: Used to display the DPF page

Data.Name: DIM_DayNightPositionLights_CF
Data.Comment: Used to indicate the presence and the activation of Automatic head lamps

Data.Name: DIM_DayNightModifiedByPCFN_CF
Data.Comment: This configuration used to force dimming off when PCFN/DisplayRequest =0.

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: ClusterUserSetMenu_P1_CF.AutomaticDoorLock
Data.Comment: Automatic door lock with speed activation

Data.Name: ClusterUserSetMenu_P1_CF.HandfreeUnlocking
Data.Comment: Handfree unlocking activation

Data.Name: ClusterUserSetMenu_P1_CF.FrontUPA
Data.Comment: Front UPA activation

Data.Name: ClusterUserSetMenu_P1_CF.RearUPA
Data.Comment: Rear UPA activation

Data.Name: ClusterUserSetMenu_P1_CF.UPAsoundVolume
Data.Comment: UPA sound volume choice

Data.Name: ClusterUserSetMenu_P1_CF.RearWiper
Data.Comment: RearWiper when rear gear engaged activation

Data.Name: ClusterUserSetMenu_P1_CF.AutomaticIntLighting
Data.Comment: Automatic internal lighting activation

Data.Name: ClusterUserSetMenu_P1_CF.SingleDoorOpening
Data.Comment: Single door opening activation

Data.Name: ClusterUserSetMenu_P1_CF.LDWvolumeByECU
Data.Comment: LDW sound volume by ECU choice

Data.Name: ClusterUserSetMenu_P1_CF.LDWvolumeByCluster
Data.Comment: LDW sound volume by Cluster choice

Data.Name: ClusterUserSetMenu_P1_CF.TSR_OSPactivation
Data.Comment: TSR/OSP activation

Data.Name: ClusterUserSetMenu_P1_CF.MeterSoundLevel
Data.Comment: Meter sound level (flashing indicators)

Data.Name: ClusterUserSetMenu_P1_CF.AutoFMHduration
Data.Comment: Auto FMH duration choice

Data.Name: ClusterUserSetMenu_P1_CF.AutomaticFrontWiper
Data.Comment: Automatic front wiper activation

Data.Name: ClusterUserSetMenu_P1_CF.FrontWiperDrop
Data.Comment: Front wiper drop activation

Data.Name: ClusterUserSetMenu_P2_CF.MirorFoldingAtDoorLockActivation
Data.Comment: Miror folding at door lock activation

Data.Name: ClusterDistBeforeReadjust
Data.Comment: Cluster stores cluster current distance before readjustement (in case of CAN or cluster incoherence)
Data.Description: The cluster stores cluster current distance before readjustement (in case of CAN incoherence or Cluster incoherence, see EN_ODO_036 and EN_ODO_040). The stored distance is the last value of cluster_current_distance calculated parameter before readjusting.

Data.Name: ClockDisplayMode_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows to display the clock info in different format dpending on market requirements.

Data.Name: Clock_CF
Data.Comment: Allows identifying the display AND management (includes setting) of the clock (CodingInstructions!)

Item.Text: Clock Displayed from CAN / RTC OFF
Clock displayed / Not set / RTC ON
Clock displayed and set / RTC ON

Data.Name: ChargingPlugTelltaleVariant_CF
Data.Comment: Used to choose the color of the telltale "Charging plug"

Data.Name: AWDMMI_CF
Data.Comment: Used to display the AWD on the display

Data.Name: ATBeepInR_CF
Data.Comment: Used to allow to emit a sound in case of AT switched to R

Data.Name: OutputControl_Buttons.Value
Data.Comment: This service is able to manage permanently pointer(s) driven by the microcontroller.

Data.Name: OutputControl_Display.Value
Data.Comment: This service is able to manage permanently the display(s) driven by the microcontroller.

Item.Text: Main Display Black image (TFT + backlight ON)
Main display - White image (TFT + backlight ON)
Main display - All pixels ON color 1 (red)
Main display - All pixels ON color 2 (green)
Main display - All pixels ON color 3 (blue)
Main display - inverted chess pattern ON

Data.Name: OutputControl_Backlight.Value
Data.Comment: This service is able to manage permanently the backlight(s) driven by the microcontroller.

Item.Text: All pointers are at rest position
With SCR Dist and Volume Page

Data.Name: Supply voltage
Data.Comment: Physical Input

Data.Name: GAU_TempoForVU_CF
Data.Comment: Used to adapt fuel stabilization temporization to LCV/CDV (big fuel tanks)

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part2_CF.VNodeBSWSonar
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: EthernetPresent_CF
Data.Comment: Used to activate / deactivate ethernet link and allow to raise DTC linked to this network

Data.Name: LastKilometersFuel
Data.Comment: Fuel autonomy = (L2 value*FuelRangeCorrectKmAutonom_CF)/LastKilometersFuel

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part2_CF.VNodeLC
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: EVDeratingPointOffset_CF
Data.Comment: This configuration is used to anticipate the TFT backlight derating curve for EV Vehicle

Data.Name: ChronoTachographPresence_CF
Data.Comment: Used in order to mask "General Odometer" value when ChronoTachograph is present

Data.Name: I_BoosterSafetybag_CF
Data.Comment: Used to inhibite the safetybag function for I-booster, function present in some EV/PHEV/HEV vehicles

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeETC_4GRIP
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeEMM
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeHEPS
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Data.Name: ECUPresent_Part2_CF.VnodeELKA
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Item.Text: class D SQI (good link, bit error rate < 1e-10)

Data.Name: VehicleManufacturerECUSoftwareNumber_DAI
Data.Comment: for Daimler

Data.Name: CauseOfLastStopService.BUIC line number related to last stop alert
Data.Comment: BUIC line number related to last stop alert (MBD parameter : CauseStop)

Data.Name: CauseOfLastStopService.BUIC line number related to last service alert
Data.Comment: BUIC line number related to last service alert (MBD parameter : CauseService)

Data.Name: ClusterUserSetMenu_P1_CF.LDWsensLevel
Data.Comment: LDW sensibility level choice

Data.Name: ClusterUserSetMenu_P1_CF.LKAsensibility
Data.Comment: LKA sensibility level choice

Data.Name: ClusterUserSetMenu_P1_CF.LDWvibrationLevel
Data.Comment: LDW vibration level choice

Data.Name: VehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber_DAI
Data.Comment: for DAimler

Data.Name: RoutineControlType
Data.Comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

Data.Name: RoutineIdentifierList
Data.Comment: Routine identifier - This is an example. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
Definition of RoutineControl

Data: RoutineIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all routine identifier that may be used with InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
  
    0x4501 - ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave

If some of these routine identifer have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the routine identifer followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the RoutineControl request, after the RoutineIdentifierList data.

Item.Text: To zero Trip Computer Variables and L2, LBackUp updates_V2
Synchronization of the total distance between Cluster ECU and external ECU

Data.Name: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
Data.Comment: This is an example data for RoutineControl request. See RoutineIdentiifierList documentation.

Data.Name: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
Data.Comment: This is an example data for RoutineControl request. See RoutineIdentiifierList documentation.

Data.Name: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq
Data.Comment: This is an example data for RoutineControl request. See RoutineIdentiifierList documentation.

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / DDT : Unusable for Clip import

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: DataWrite.FrontSBRInhibition_CF
Request.Comment: Careful, don't display this action on a screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Extended
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSupportedDTC_CPDD Import
Request.Comment: Report supported DTC for Clip import

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: DataRead.TypeApprovalNumber
Request.Comment: READ - Références Pièces - Numéro d'homologation analogique

Request.Name: DataRead.CauseOfLastStopService
Request.Comment: Read CauseOfLastStopService.BUIC line number related to last service alert

DataItem.Name: CauseOfLastStopService.BUIC line number related to last service alert
CauseOfLastStopService.BUIC line number related to last stop alert

Request.Name: DataWrite.GaugingThreshold.screens
Request.Comment: The "C_SEUILS" parameter is used to define 2 parameters (SEUIL_H and SEUIL_B)

Request.Name: DataRead.GaugingThreshold.screens
Request.Comment: The "C_SEUILS" parameter is used to define 2 parameters (SEUIL_H and SEUIL_B)

Request.Name: DataWrite.S3
Request.Comment: The "C_S3" parameter is used to define 2 parameters (kMinS3 and kMajS3)

Request.Name: DataRead.S3
Request.Comment: The "C_S3" parameter is used to define 2 parameters (kMinS3 and kMajS3)

Request.Name: DataRead.Odometer of the last occurence
Request.Comment: Read Odometer of the last occurence

Request.Name: DataRead.TypeApprovalNumber2
Request.Comment: READ - Références Pièces - Numéro d'homologation numeric

Request.Name: DataRead.Display_IO_read
Request.Comment: This request is not used. Just to comply with Daimler ODX ddt check

Request.Name: DataRead.Buttons_IO_read
Request.Comment: This request is not used. Just to comply with Daimler ODX ddt check

Request.Name: DataRead.Backlight_IO_read
Request.Comment: This request is not used. Just to comply with Daimler ODX ddt check

Request.Name: DataRead.FanControl_IO_read
Request.Comment: This request is not used. Just to comply with Daimler ODX ddt check

Request.Name: DataRead.Telltale_IO_read
Request.Comment: This request is not used. Just to comply with Daimler ODX ddt check

Request.Name: DataRead.Pointer_IO_read
Request.Comment: This request is not used. Just to comply with Daimler ODX ddt check

Request.Name: DataRead.Sound_IO_read
Request.Comment: This request is not used. Just to comply with Daimler ODX ddt check

Request.Name: DataRead.SoundTunning_IO_read
Request.Comment: This request is not used. Just to comply with Daimler ODX ddt check

Request.Name: RoutineControl.DeltaOilMeasuresForDiag_V2
Request.Comment: The Cluster ECU shall provide "To zero ADAC simulation command + L2 and LBackUp updates" routine, Routine ID = $01

Request.Name: RoutineControl.ServiceReset_V2
Request.Comment: Used to reset Service counter (Time and Distance)

Request.Name: RoutineControl.ReturnToInitialConfiguration_V2
Request.Comment: CLUSTER shall perform "Return to initial configuration" following details below, Routine ID = $04

Request.Name: RoutineControl.SynchronizationOfTheTotalDISTANCEBetweenClusterAndExternalECU_V2
Request.Comment: The Cluster ECU shall provide "Synchronization of the total DISTANCE between Cluster ECU and external ECU" routine, Routine ID = $03

Request.Name: RoutineControl.Oil drain reset_V2
Request.Comment: The Cluster ECU shall provide "the maintenance schedule reset" routine, Routine ID = $02.

Request.Name: RoutineControl.ToZeroTripComputerVariablesAndL2_LBackUpUpdates_V2
Request.Comment: The Cluster ECU shall provide "To zero ADAC simulation command + L2 and LBackUp updates" routine, Routine ID = $01

Request.Name: RoutineControl
Request.Comment: You should remove ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.xxx data. These are examples.

Device.Name: High Side PWM outputs for backlight monitoring

Label.Text: In case of analogic display, only "TypeApprovalNumber2" is used
In case of numeric display, only "TypeApprovalNumber" is used

Button.Text: Click to take in account the conf. change
Click to take in account the conf. change
Click to take in account the conf. change
Click to take in account the conf. change
Click to take in account the conf. change
Click to take in account the conf. change
Click to return to initial configuration
Click to take in account the conf. change
Click to take in account conf. change
Synchronization of the total DISTANCE between Cluster ECU and external ECU
To zero Trip Computer Variables and L2, LBackUp updates

Display.DataName: CauseOfLastStopService.BUIC line number related to last service alert
CauseOfLastStopService.BUIC line number related to last stop alert
